race.comment: SACRED BULL (11) has been well in the betting at the past four outings and where there's smoke there's fire. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and should give a good account. VERMILION KIRIN (3) got a well-deserved victory at the latest effort and will have derived a stack of confidence from that win. Has to be included from the low draw. HEAVENLY LOVE (5) has been plying his trade in harder races in town and should appreciate the drop back in grade here. Looks well placed against this line-up. DREAM THINKER (9) has two wins and a second from his past three efforts and must be respected out of the Gollan yard. Top-three prospects. ARIZONA DREAMING (1) rounds out the selections in a wide open affair.
